channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Slab with brail studs gif the blind broken, 27th March
item.description:
Slabs broken .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on Princess Elizabeth way, 27th March
item.description:
Flytipping under a tree on Princess Elizabeth Way, near to Orchard Avenue and the walkway linking Princess Elizabth Way with Quebec Drive. Please can you collect and dispose of properly. I don't know how long it's been there, I only saw it this afternoon. Many thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 303, Princess Elizabeth Way, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Verge of footpath at northern end of westend lane hucclecote, 27th March
item.description:
There is flytipped garden waste on footpath verge can this be arranged to be cleared before tipping on this site increases

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West End Lane, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This pothole was previously reported and now being reported as being fixed large vehicles hitting it are making our house shake. Please fix this time., 27th March
item.description:
Pothole on Gretton road between fair winds and aldersmead having been reported on 20/02/2026 and now on the 27/03/2026 being reported as fixed has not been done.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Gretton Road, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on yellow lines and in bus stop, 27th March
item.description:
Constant poor parking on double yellows and in bus stop on church road and in chapel hay lane particularly in the early evenings.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chapel Hay Lane, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large piece of chipboard left outside my house, 27th March
item.description:
I have reported this problem several times since Christmas and it’s still there. My hedge is now becoming damaged to to the chipboard leaning against it. Why has it not been collected?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 27th March
item.description:
Depression CW 600x600x50mm Standard TM (CW6 Rutting&Depressions)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 27th March
item.description:
Depression CW 1700x1100x60mm Standard TM (CW6 Rutting&Depressions)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping and general building waste from building site, 27th March
item.description:
On the entrance to footpath at labelled. 2 large concrete drainage pipes that have been again filled with rubbish and building waste. Also on the ground just past these items between the metal partitions between building works and hedge , plastic building waste and plastic bottles from building site. I have also contacted Persimmon builders to get site manager to manage boundary line and clear up waste that builders have chick their bottle over the metal fence. I explained it was never like this before building works started and it needs sorting out.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken paving slabs, permanently covered with gravel from nearby area, 27th March
item.description:
Outside no. 6
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Hayes Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
